title: フィリーズレビューの後に・カワイイ夢

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Bro! How was I?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Big Sis! How was I?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: If you ask me, I think I did a pretty good job!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She ran well, and the results were along what we
expected, but... I got the feeling that she
wouldn't have been able to keep it up for much
longer.
choice_data_list:
If I'm being completely honest, I think the
longer races might be too much for you.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But... I really do want the Triple Tiara.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing her determination, I have a hard time
breaking the news to her.
choice_data_list: I wouldn't say there's no chance at all, but...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It's okay. I get it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: All right. No Triple Tiara, then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't see any sign of resignation or compromise
in her expression. All I can see is... a sparkle in her
eyes gleaming forward to the future.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
The tiara is something only possible to attain in
your classic year. It's not something you can put
off for "someday."

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I trust your decision. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I trust your decision. Besides...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll just have to shine brighter than the Triple
Tiara, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's tough to throw away a dream. I'm deeply
impressed by her ability to move on.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I've decided! I'm gonna put all my energy into
sprints from now on!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I'll win all of them and travel a path even cuter
than the Triple Tiara tour! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's made her decision, there's a race
I'd like to propose to her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Sprinters Stakes is a G1 sprint where the top
sprinter is decided, so I want to set it as her next
big racing goal.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Wow! A G1! I like it. Perfect for my new dream!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yep! A dream to take the place of the tiara.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
A dream to win a big race and become the most
beloved runner of all. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Yep! No matter where she runs, the most beloved
Umamusume will always be the cutest.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Bathing in the spotlight with everyone cheering
for me... That's, like, the pinnacle of cute!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Now I'm getting pumped! ♪ I'm gonna do
my best to become the most beloved runner!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As usual, Curren Chan has a unique way of
thinking. But G1 races are no walk in the park. Is
this new direction really for the best?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Oh, but... isn't it a long time until that race?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I don't wanna have zero exposure until then... Can
we decide on another race too?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I was going to suggest that myself. Alongside her
training, a good race to act as a stepping stone
to her dream would be...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It may be lower in status, but it'd be a good way
to get reacquainted with a 1,200-meter race.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Let's do it! It'll be the first step toward my dream
of being the most beloved runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we decide to set our sights on the Aoi
Stakes!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
...But not just the race. It might be time to put "that"
into motion.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Nothing! Let's do our best. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Nothing! Let's do our best. ♪
